cards.title: Task Dependencies and Decomposition
cards.governance_note: Map task boundaries, dependency edges, parallel groups, and governance-gated merge/publish steps.

cards.title: Shared State and Synchronization
cards.governance_note: Review shared-state ownership, synchronization, lock ordering, atomic writes, idempotence, and retries.

cards.title: Observability, Speedup, and Governance
cards.governance_note: Audit performance claims, Amdahl limits, traces, queue metrics, partial-success checks, reproducibility, and failure isolation.
